label: The Fool
alt_title: Il Matto, Le Fou, Le Mat
description: Represents beginnings, innocence, and spontaneous action. Usually an unnumbered card, but sometimes it is numbered as 0 or more rarely XXII.

label: The Juggler
alt_title: The Magician, Il Mago, Il Bagatto, Bagatino, Le Bateleur

label: The Popess
alt_title: The High Priestess, La Papessa, La Papesse
description: Represents intuition, sacred knowledge, and the subconscious.

label: The Emperor
description: Represents authority, structure, and a father figure.

label: The Pope
alt_title: The Hierophant, Il Papa, Le Pape
description: Represents spiritual wisdom, religious beliefs, and tradition.

label: The Hermit
description: Represents soul-searching, introspection, and being alone.

label: Wheel of Fortune
alt_title: La Ruota della Fortuna, La Roue de Fortune
description: Represents good luck, karma, and life cycles.

label: Strenght
alt_title: Fortitude, La Forza, La Fortezza, Force

label: The Hanged Man
description: Represents pause, surrender, and letting go.

label: The Devil
description: Represents shadow self, attachment, and addiction.

label: The Tower
description: Represents sudden change, upheaval, and revelation.

label: Judgement
alt_title: The Last Judgment, Le Jugement, Il Giudizio
description: Represents rebirth, inner calling, and absolution.
